failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. git clone via HTTPS failed (403: Write access to repository not granted). GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT has repo metadata permissions but lacks contents:read permission. GitHub MCP tools restricted to rsa-data-solutions/always-on-engineering-fleet only. Local git proxy at 127.0.0.1:41485 returned 502 (repository not authorized) — iNova not in session scope. No SSH available. No tests could run.

notes: RECURRING (day 27): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 27 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-06-15). Root cause: GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT lacks contents:read permission scope AND iNova is not in this session's GitHub MCP repo scope. ACTION REQUIRED: regenerate GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT with 'Contents: Read' permission on RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova, OR add iNova to the session's source repos, OR add a read-only deploy key.
